---
title: "Introduction"
---

<style type="text/css">
  body{
  font-size: 13pt;
}
</style>




<img style="float: right; width:30%; height:30%; padding-left: 2em" src="photo.png"> 
Hello! Welcome to my website. My name is Mark Krysan and I am currently a PhD student in the Biostatistics Department in the University of Iowa College of Public Health. 
### Contact
Email:  [krysanma@grinnell.edu](mailto:mkrysan@uiowa.edu)

GitHub: [github.com/mkrysan](https://github.com/mkrysan)
